mapper.select: SELECT qn.quantitative_evaluation_id AS quantitativeEvaluationId, qn.employee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, qn.eval_period_id AS evalPeriodId, ep.eval_year AS evalYear, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, qn.equipment_id AS equipmentId, qn.uph_score AS uphScore, qn.yield_score AS yieldScore, qn.lead_time_score AS leadTimeScore, qn.actual_error AS actualError, qn.s_quant AS sQuant, qn.t_score AS tScore, qn.material_shielding AS materialShielding, qn.status FROM quantitative_evaluation qn JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qn.employee_id JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qn.eval_period_id WHERE qn.quantitative_evaluation_id = #{evaluationId}

SELECT qn.employee_id AS employeeId, e.employee_name AS employeeName, ep.eval_year AS year, ep.eval_sequence AS evalSequence, qn.equipment_id AS equipmentId, qn.uph_score AS uphScore, qn.yield_score AS yieldScore, qn.lead_time_score AS leadTimeScore, qn.actual_error AS actualError, qn.s_quant AS sQuant, qn.t_score AS tScore, qn.status FROM quantitative_evaluation qn JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = qn.employee_id JOIN evaluation_period ep ON ep.eval_period_id = qn.eval_period_id WHERE qn.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND ep.eval_year = #{year} AND ep.eval_sequence = #{evalSequence} ORDER BY qn.equipment_id ASC
